title: PGIMER Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 03 Senior Resident Posts
description: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) has released an official notification for 2026. To fill up the 03 vacancies for Senior Resident Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the MD/ MS can grab this chance and apply for the PGIMER Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
